name: PushCheck
description: Friend-group accountability app for push-ups. Track your push-ups, challenge your friends, and see who actually shows up. Simple, clean, and built for friend groups.
tagline: Track push-ups. Challenge friends. See who shows up.
featureList: Real-time leaderboards showing who's showing up
Daily push-up tracking with simple manual entry
Streak tracking visible to your friends
Social accountability - friends see your progress
No ads, no premium tiers, completely free

targetAudience.audienceType: Friend groups who want accountability for push-ups

about.name: Push-up accountability for friend groups
about.description: PushCheck helps friend groups stay accountable with push-ups. Unlike solo fitness apps, PushCheck focuses exclusively on friend-group accountability through leaderboards, challenges, and social pressure. See who's showing up and who's making excuses.

comparisonTargets.name: LogReps
comparisonTargets.difference: PushCheck is push-up-specific with friend accountability, while LogReps is a general rep tracker

comparisonTargets.name: PushStreak
comparisonTargets.difference: PushCheck focuses on friend groups and leaderboards, while PushStreak focuses on solo streaks

comparisonTargets.name: 100 Push-Ups Trainer
comparisonTargets.difference: PushCheck is about friend accountability, not training programs

useCases: Friend groups who talk about working out but struggle with consistency
Groups that want friendly competition and accountability
People who prefer social motivation over solo tracking
Friend groups looking for a simple, no-BS fitness app
